data.description: The bill to fund the US Homeland security department falling short in the US Senate; voting continues.

data.title: NexusTek listed in CRN's 2026 MSP 500 List, marking ten years of recognition as a top managed service provider in Denver.
data.description: Denver-based company NexusTek has been recognized as a leading managed service provider for the tenth year in a row. The company offers cloud services, managed IT solutions, and cybersecurity services on a national scale. This accolade was awarded by CRN®, a division of The Channel Company.

data.title: B&J Welding Supply acquires GM Welding Supply in San Angelo, TX, expanding their footprint in the industry.
data.description: Dallas, February 12, 2026 - In an exciting development, Cordatus Capital (Cordatus) and B&J Welding Supply have successfully completed the acquisition of GM Welding Supply, a company based in San Angelo, TX. GM Welding Supply specializes in distributing industrial gases, propane, and welding supplies, aligning seamlessly with the products offered by Cordatus and B&J. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone in the companies' growth plans and will strengthen their presence in the market.

data.title: Uber and Mazda partner to enhance U.S. dealership experience, boosting efficiencies and satisfaction. Uber's ongoing efforts to diversify service offerings and expand partnerships. Launches Abu Dhabi's first robotaxi service alongside WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ: WRD).
data.description: Uber Technologies, Inc. has partnered with Mazda to enhance customer experience at U.S. dealerships, aiming to improve interactions and increase efficiency and satisfaction. This collaboration reflects Uber's efforts to expand beyond ride-hailing and leverage its technology platform in different sectors. The partnership highlights Uber's commitment to diversifying its service offerings and enhancing customer experiences. Additionally, Uber, along with WeRide Inc., has launched Abu Dhabi's first commercial robotaxi service. This move showcases Uber's dedication to innovation and expanding its presence in the evolving transportation landscape, potentially attracting more users and partners for long-term growth. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ETH ETF investors are facing challenges compared to BTC peers amid crypto market bottom search. Data from Bloomberg indicates no signs of capitulation.
data.description: Investors holding Bitcoin and Ether spot ETFs are facing significant losses amidst the ongoing market search for a potential bottom. According to data from Bloomberg, it appears that neither group of investors is giving up despite the challenging situation.

data.title: Kyndryl launches Intelligent Recovery Service for cyber resilience and compliance, offering faster recovery and real-time monitoring.
data.description: A recent launch of a new service offers improved recovery speed, live tracking, and proactive supervision to boost customer business continuity and adherence to regulations. Kyndryl (NYSE: KD), a prominent provider of essential enterprise tech services, introduced this innovation on Feb. 12, 2026, in New York.

data.title: Airbnb & Expedia report earnings post AI concerns. Investors await results after recent sell-off.
data.description: Today, Airbnb and Expedia are scheduled to release their financial earnings. Investors are eager to see if robust performances can help bolster the stocks following a recent sell-off. Last week's concerns over artificial intelligence have prompted a closer watch on the earnings reports from both companies. This news has been covered by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Fastly stock rose 75% on Q4 earnings beat, revenue surpassed estimates, AI apps increased network traffic. Akamai also advanced.
data.description: Fastly's stock experienced a significant surge, jumping 75%, following the announcement of their fourth-quarter earnings and revenue that exceeded expectations. The company's success was attributed to the increased network traffic driven by artificial intelligence applications. In contrast, their competitor Akamai also saw positive growth.

data.title: Cisco's profit margin outlook discourages Dell, Arista, HPE, NetApp as stock prices plummet due to higher memory chip costs.
data.description: Stocks of tech companies such as Cisco, Dell, Arista, and HPE experienced a decline following Cisco's statement about the negative impact of higher memory chip prices on profit margins. This led to a drop in shares of Dell, HPE, Arista, and NetApp. The market reaction was influenced by Cisco's outlook on profit margins.

data.title: Serial entrepreneur Jess Mah, aka Jessica Mah, believes that in the current tight funding market, the strongest founders are emerging.
data.description: In San Francisco on February 12, 2026, serial entrepreneur and investor Jess Mah, also recognized as Jessica Mah, commented on the current global investment landscape. With the transition to increased interest rates and enhanced capital allocation discipline, Mah stated that the demanding situation is fostering more robust outcomes.

data.title: Trojan Battery Company appoints Motive Energy as new master distributor, expanding service in Western US. - Feb. 12, 2026
data.description: Trojan Battery Company has recently announced a new partnership that expands its distribution network across the Western United States, aiming to enhance services and support for customers. The collaboration, effective as of February 12, 2026, establishes a stronger presence for Trojan in Santa Fe Springs, California. As a renowned figure in battery innovation, the company is looking to solidify its market reach in the region with this move. This development signifies a strategic effort to serve a broader clientele within the Western U.S. and reinforce Trojan's position as a leading provider of cutting-edge battery solutions.

data.title: Chrysler Pacifica wins Consumer Guide Best Buy Award for 10th year, remains America's top-selling minivan.
data.description: In Auburn Hills, Michigan, as of February 12, 2026, the editorial team at Consumer Guide Automotive has selected the Chrysler Pacifica as a recipient of their prestigious Best Buy award. The Chrysler Pacifica, which is recognized as America's leading minivan in terms of sales, offers a top-tier feature of available all-wheel-drive (AWD) capability. The evaluation process conducted by the editorial team to determine the winners of this award is known for its thoroughness and stringency.

data.title: Europe's first in-hospital Boron Neutron Capture Therapy facility opened after a 10-year collaboration, with first patients treated in 2025.
data.description: Participants gathered to commemorate the achievements of a decade-long partnership which resulted in treating the initial patients in the year 2025. The inaugural clinical trial carried out at the HUS BNCT center is reaching its conclusion. The event took place in Helsinki and Boston on February 12, 2026. Neutron Therapeutics LLC (NT) and the Helsinki-based organization were involved in this significant collaborative effort that led to this milestone.
